description_long: This is an open, medium-sized book with slightly yellowed pages, suggesting age or frequent use. The pages display faint, sketch-like illustrations or markings, giving the book a well-worn, artistic appearance. A thin, red ribbon bookmark runs vertically down the center, with a hint of green visible near the spine, possibly another bookmark or decorative element. The book's cover is dark, likely black or deep brown, and appears to be made of a sturdy material, possibly leather or heavy cardboard. The edges of the pages are slightly uneven, adding to the book's vintage or hand-crafted feel. No visible text, cover illustration, or publisher logo is present on the open pages or visible cover.
description: An open, aged book with faint sketches on yellowed pages and a red ribbon bookmark, featuring a dark, sturdy cover.
description_view_0: The book is open, showing both pages with faint sketches and a prominent red ribbon bookmark running down the center.
description_view_1: Viewed from the top edge, the book appears mostly closed, with the red and green bookmarks visible at the spine.
description_view_2: The open pages are visible, with the red ribbon bookmark and faint illustrations more clearly seen on the right page.
description_view_3: From the bottom edge, the book is mostly closed, with the cover and slightly uneven page edges visible.
